loginScript: (async () => { try { var hasSession = document.cookie.split(';').some(function (c) { return c.trim().split('=')[0].endsWith('next-auth.session-token'); }); if (hasSession) { return; } var csrf = await (await fetch('/api/auth/csrf', { credentials: 'include' })).json(); var body = new URLSearchParams({ csrfToken: csrf.csrfToken, email: 'pro@example.com', password: 'pro', callbackUrl: '/event-types', json: 'true' }); var res = await fetch('/api/auth/callback/credentials', { method: 'POST', credentials: 'include', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' }, body: body.toString() }); if (res.ok) { window.location.replace('/event-types'); } } catch (e) { console.error('[alloy] auto-login failed', e); } })();
